protocolGate: Pre-existing Jest suite plus static portability/auth scan must pass with zero failure lines, and the per-flow fix-map task range collision must be corrected before live auth begins.

roleMap.note: FLOW-33 is engine-internal. Platform-admin owns full access; platform-support is read-only/partial; anonymous is limited to first-run bootstrap.

initialFindings.implementationStateDrift: FLOW-33 implementation state and reconciliation evidence disagree with the active server tree: the expected system-initiation-bootstrap source directory is absent, while UI reflection points to meta-arbitration as the observed implementation directory for FLOW-33 services.

taskRangeCollision.collision: FLOW-32 owns T516-T535, so active FLOW-33 references to T516-T522 were treated as a portability blocker.
taskRangeCollision.fixMapDirective: PER-FLOW-FIX-MAP-v2.9 orders FLOW-33 task range collision correction before directory correction, shared-interface dedup, governance generation, and GitHub repo provisioning.

preFixJest.note: The name pattern also matched FLOW-45 system-initiation-bootstrap-v2 suites; this is recorded as inherited suite overlap, not a failure.

fixesApplied: Corrected FLOW-33 contract task IDs from T516-T522 to T536-T542 in generation-loop contracts and seed prompts.
Corrected FLOW-33 registry seed entries in EngineBootstrapper to T536-T542 while restoring FLOW-32's T516-T535 range comment.
Corrected feature-registry bootstrap-internal task IDs and tests from old FLOW-33 task IDs to T536/T539/T540/T541.
Corrected bundle activation references so per-flow bootstrap orchestration calls T536 BootstrapOrchestrator.
Updated FLOW-33 planning/session docs and the canonical architecture registry rows to remove the FLOW-32 collision.

flow33Jest.note: The name pattern also matched FLOW-45 system-initiation-bootstrap-v2 suites; no failures.

typescript.command: Push-Location server; npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json --pretty false; Pop-Location

staticScanAfterFix.note: The protocol's exported *Service class scan returns zero because the FLOW-33 classes are task-named in .service.ts files; directory/name correction remains tracked in the FLOW-33 state file.

activeOldTaskReferenceScan.command: Scan active FLOW-33 contract, bootstrap, service, and test files for old T516-T522 task declarations.

rangeAssertions.bundleActivationBootstrapCall: FLOW-00 bundle activation references T536 BootstrapOrchestrator
